novyxlabs/change-intelligence.description: Ownership heuristics and rule loading should stay documented in the primary product README.
Core scoring and release-note logic should update the architecture walkthrough.
Webhook orchestration changes affect the end-to-end pipeline doc.
Reviewer feedback capture changes affect the monitoring and proof-window doc.
Metrics and proof-window changes should update the monitoring plan.
Workflow surface changes usually affect setup and operational guidance.

novyxlabs/novyx-core.description: Search/query tool changes should update the search API reference.
Query behavior also affects the memories read-path reference.
Ingestion changes affect memory creation and mutation semantics.
Sentinel and operational integrity checks belong with the audit API docs.
Memory-health changes should update eval and drift documentation.
Agent-manifest and behavior changes usually affect conceptual memory docs.

novyxlabs/novyx-mcp.description: Server and transport changes should update the MCP overview.
Tool surface changes should update the MCP tools reference.
Local memory extension changes affect MCP local-mode docs.
Behavioral test changes around the MCP surface usually indicate tool-reference drift.

novyxlabs/novyx-starter-kit.description: Template changes should update installation and bootstrap docs.
Example and starter-flow changes should update quickstart guidance.
Workflow automation changes often affect the developer guide path.

novyxlabs/novyx-memory-skill.description: Memory-skill behavior should stay aligned with the Claude Code integration guide.
Memory-skill reference changes usually affect knowledge-graph usage guidance.

novyxlabs/novyx-vault.description: Vault audit route changes should update the audit API reference.
Replay route changes should update replay documentation.
Space-management changes should update the spaces API docs.

novyxlabs/novyx-site.description: Changelog page changes should update the public changelog content.
Guide page changes should update the matching guide content.
Public error-surface changes should update the errors reference.
Control UI changes often reflect action and approval contract changes.

novyxlabs/novyx-control.description: Connector contract changes should update the Novyx API contract doc.
Control audit and trace mapping changes should update the trace-mapping architecture doc.
Envelope encoding changes should update the action-envelope architecture doc.
Novyx client wiring should update the integration architecture doc.
Server entrypoint changes usually affect quickstart and local-run instructions.
